# Submission logistics & response letter

## Summary
Packaging for resubmission. Response letter, disclosure statements, replication materials, manuscriptcentral upload. Do last, target ~4 months from revision start.

## Files
- All referee reports (for response letter): `referee_reports/Hot Towel - AEJ Micro Revision.docx`
- Submitted version: `referee_reports/hot_towel_full.pdf`
- Revised paper: `writeup/hot_towel.pdf`

## Keep in mind
- Editor target: ~4 months (12 months is the maximum).
- Editor calls this "mostly an expositional revision" — don't over-engineer.
- AEA Disclosure Policy: https://www.aeaweb.org/aea_journals/AEA_Disclosure_Policy.pdf
- Do not edit the original submission. Must go through "Create a Revision" on manuscriptcentral.com/aej-micro.

## Actionable items

### Response letter (main deliverable)
- [ ] Write point-by-point response to the editor (letter §1 Model, §2 Framing, §3 Wage, §4 Truthtelling, §5 Minor)
- [ ] Write point-by-point response to R1 (typos + survey clarification)
- [ ] Write point-by-point response to R2 (§1 Clarity, §2 Truthtelling, §3 Second signal, smaller comments)
- [ ] Write point-by-point response to R3 (§1 Literature, §2 Market vs marketplace, §3 Garbling, §4 V.A, §5 Future work — declined)
- [ ] Add summary of changes (1-2 pages)
- [ ] Combine into single PDF

### Admin
- [ ] Gather disclosure statement from each coauthor (Horton, Johari, Kircher + Peyman if listed as RA)
- [ ] Confirm IRB approval status; note it in the submission
- [ ] Package replication materials: data, code, documentation
- [ ] Clean up replication package (remove redundant files; check `analysis/`, `computed_objects/`, `etl/`)

### Upload
- [ ] Log into http://mc.manuscriptcentral.com/aej-micro
- [ ] Navigate to Author Center → Manuscripts with Decisions → "Create a Revision"
- [ ] Upload: revised paper PDF, response PDF, disclosure statements, replication package
- [ ] Delete any redundant files from the prior submission before finalizing

## Source
Editor's Letter "Resubmission Instructions."

## Owner
Peyman.
